Package gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service.accesscontrol

Class AccessControlService

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service.accesscontrol.AccessControlService
All Implemented Interfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IAccessControlService, org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean
@Service public class AccessControlService extends Object implements org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean, gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IAccessControlService
Implements the IAccessControlService for IZ Gateway.

      Parameters:
      factory - The repository factory to use
      registry - The registry for managing access control to methods
      migrator - The access control migrator

      public void setMigrated(boolean migrated)
      Sets the migrated status, used for unit testing when accessing a database that has already been migrated.
      Parameters:

    • getFileType

      public gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IFileType getFileType(String reportType)
      Look up a FileType by report type name (case-insensitive). Delegates to NewModelHelper which holds the fileTypeCache.
      Specified by:
      getFileType in interface gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IAccessControlService
      Parameters:
      reportType - the report type name (e.g. "routineImmunization")
      Returns:
      the matching FileType, or null if not found

    • checkAccessToDestination

      public void checkAccessToDestination(String destId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Check access to a destination and throw a fault or log a warning if access would not be granted.
      Specified by:
      checkAccessToDestination in interface gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IAccessControlService
      Parameters:
      destId - The destination
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault - If access is denied
